ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "call_or_put" TEXT /* Type of trade (call or put) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "ptmtradeday" INTEGER /* Trading day (in number of days) */,
  "k" REAL /* Strike price */,
  "rate" REAL /* Interest rate */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "s" REAL /* Underlying price */,
  "iv" REAL /* Implied volatility */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of contracts traded */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest (total number of outstanding contracts) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the option */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the assets table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "trade_version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "trade_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trade was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stock, ETF, index) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions in JSON format */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the trades table */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_versions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
